title: Pool Guest Pass
scene: 你住公寓，想带朋友去社区泳池。

turns.cn: 住户卡请刷一下，访客要登记。
turns.en: Swipe your resident card. Guests need to sign in.

turns.cn: 朋友今天来游泳，访客证怎么买？
turns.en: A friend is swimming today. How do guest passes work?

turns.cn: 一天五块，最多两位访客。
turns.en: Five dollars per day, up to two guests.

turns.cn: 需要跟我在旁边吗？
turns.en: Do I need to stay with them?

turns.cn: 住户必须在场，十二岁以下要成人陪。
turns.en: Residents must be present. Under twelve needs an adult.

turns.cn: 泳池几点关？
turns.en: What time does the pool close?

turns.cn: 晚九点，请先冲淋浴。
turns.en: Nine PM. Please shower first.

title: Gym Orientation
scene: 你第一次去小区会所健身房。

turns.cn: 第一次来？我带您熟悉器械。
turns.en: First time? I'll show you around the equipment.

turns.cn: 会费包含在物业费里吗？
turns.en: Is the gym included in HOA fees?

turns.cn: 基础器械免费，私教另收费。
turns.en: Basic equipment is free. Personal training is extra.

turns.cn: 毛巾要自己带吗？
turns.en: Do I bring my own towel?

turns.cn: 前台可领，用完投回收筐。
turns.en: Pick one up at the desk. Drop it in the bin after.

turns.cn: 高峰几点人少？
turns.en: When is it least crowded?

turns.cn: 上午十点到十二点通常空。
turns.en: Usually quiet from ten to noon.

title: Tennis Court Booking
scene: 你在会所前台订网球场。

turns.cn: 网球场要提前订，每次一小时。
turns.en: Courts are by reservation, one hour per slot.

turns.cn: 周日早上九点有空吗？
turns.en: Is Sunday at nine AM open?

turns.cn: 有，需要灯费吗？室内场加五块。
turns.en: Yes. Need lights? Indoor is five extra.

turns.cn: 室外就行，能借球拍吗？
turns.en: Outdoor is fine. Can we borrow rackets?

turns.cn: 前台押金二十，还了退。
turns.en: Twenty deposit at the desk, refunded on return.

turns.cn: 迟到十分钟还算吗？
turns.en: If we're ten minutes late, do we still get the hour?

turns.cn: 从预约时间算，请准时。
turns.en: The clock starts at booking time. Please be on time.

title: Clubhouse Rental
scene: 你想租社区会所办生日聚会。

turns.cn: 会所四小时两百，押金一百。
turns.en: Clubhouse is two hundred for four hours, hundred deposit.

turns.cn: 下周六晚上六点，大概二十人。
turns.en: Next Saturday at six PM, about twenty people.

turns.cn: 十点后禁大声，厨房可用但需清理。
turns.en: Quiet after ten. Kitchen available but must be cleaned.

turns.cn: 能自带酒水吗？
turns.en: Can we bring our own drinks?

turns.cn: 可以，垃圾袋我们提供。
turns.en: Yes. We provide trash bags.

turns.cn: 怎么交押金？
turns.en: How do I pay the deposit?

turns.cn: 支票或业主门户在线付。
turns.en: Check or pay through the resident portal.

title: Hot Tub Rules
scene: 你想用会所热水按摩池，咨询规定。

turns.cn: 热水池最多八人，每次十五分钟。
turns.en: Hot tub holds eight, fifteen minutes per session.

turns.cn: 孕妇可以用吗？
turns.en: Is it okay for pregnant women?

turns.cn: 建议先问医生，水温一百零四华氏度。
turns.en: Ask your doctor first. It's one oh four degrees.

turns.cn: 需要戴泳帽吗？
turns.en: Do I need a swim cap?

turns.cn: 不用，但请穿泳装，禁止玻璃杯。
turns.en: No cap, but swimwear required. No glass.

turns.cn: 现在有人排队吗？
turns.en: Is there a line right now?

turns.cn: 两人，您先登记轮候。
turns.en: Two people ahead. Sign up and wait your turn.
